entity.country_or_origin: Solana, Base, and BNB Chain ecosystems
entity.summary: Proprietary automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with substantial current spot-swap volume across Solana, Base, and BNB Chain deployments.
entity.notes: Current independently maintained exchange metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume across Solana, Base, and BNB Chain. The protocol description retains the older Solana Prop AMM wording while current chain-level metrics show broader deployment. A stable first-party website was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unknown and confidence remains medium. Tessera V is not conflated with unrelated products using the Tessera name.

evidence.title: Tessera V volume metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume across Solana, Base, and BNB Chain, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Tessera DEX volume adapter
evidence.notes: The maintained exchange-volume adapter identifies the Tessera contracts and records swap-event volume used by the current DEX registry.
